description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6 Docker image. Define two stages: build and test. Add a "build site" job in the build stage that runs npm install --progress=false then npm run build, and stores the generated "dist" directory as an artifact that expires in one week. Add a "unit test" job in the test stage that runs npm install --progress=false followed by npm run unit. No services, caches, or special rules are needed.
